Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}All right, today we're gonna see some of the greatest matches the champs have ever—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}...And here we are with the first match of the qualifiers. In the red corner, we have...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Akihiko Sanada-kun, from Gekkoukan High School![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}This is footage from my first official match. My coach from back then recorded it for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Ah, sorry, looks like I put on the wrong video. Let me switch it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}Hey, come on. It's not that interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Yeah, I guess it has been quite some time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But I guess this might be a good opportunity. Let's watch it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I look so stiff and nervous. And my form is all over the place...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}How did I even win this? At least I can tell I've improved since then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Here's where I get my left straight in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}And the winner is Sanada-kun, from the red corner![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Check out my face. I'm trying to look calm, but on the inside I can barely contain myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I know I said before that I just wanted to learn how to fight with my bare hands, but this might actually be why I stuck with boxing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}This victory gave me confidence. I wasn't so stiff in any of my later matches.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Are you the type to get nervous in front of a bunch of people like that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}That's what I like to hear. You're just as reliable as a leader ought to be.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}If you ever wanna try getting in the ring, I'd be glad to have you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}Well, that's a surprise. You don't seem like you let the small things bother you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But I guess you're good at not letting your weakness show, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Yeah, I guess you wouldn't really know how tense that feels without experiencing it for yourself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}If you ever wanna try getting in the ring, I'd be glad to have you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I've learned a lot from boxing, but there's a strict rule I follow when it comes to winning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Find your opportunity, then strike without hesitation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It's easy enough to remember, but hard to apply. You could say the same thing about fighting Shadows, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I've always tried to keep those words in mind, but now I'll be even more conscious of them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada seems to have found new potential[n]within himself after watching the DVD.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 9 25 25}You know, I never thought you'd see me like that... But it did help remind me how I felt when I was starting out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Anyway, sorry you had to sit through that. We'll save the champion matches for next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} has improved[n]after seeing Sanada fighting his hardest...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}...Now we move on to round two of the qualifiers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}In the red corner: Akihiko Sanada-kun, from Gekkoukan High School![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}...There's another one? Well, since we're already here, wanna watch some more before we go to sleep?[n]{f 1 1}
